objective: Test whether expanding the right-side source supply closes the Wave 66 five-row dynamic-pairing preflight gap.
non_negotiables: This is a pre-materialization diagnostic and must not be treated as selected exact support.
Rows must still require materialization, replay, leakage, and baseline gates before promotion.
The report must compare against Wave 66's 145 selected pairs and 5-row gap.
A no-go result must record that increasing right-side signature supply did not increase selected support.

tasks.prompt: Add and run an all-left/all-right dynamic unseen-value/signature pairing preflight.
outputs: all-left/all-right dynamic pairing preflight CLI command
acceptance: The report records right-side signature profile expansion from Wave 66's 371 to 545.
The report records that selected support remains 145 pairs with topology counts 48/49/48.
The report records the remaining 2/1/2 topology-family gaps.
Docs state that right-side source supply alone does not close rpf50.

tasks.prompt: Record Wave 67 as a right-side source-supply no-go that leaves selected support at Wave 66's 145 pairs.
commands: python3 -m py_compile engine/ml_model.py engine/test.py agents/network.py agents/label_schema.py
acceptance: Docs state that all-right source expansion raises right signatures to 545.
Docs state that selected support remains 145 pairs and the rpf50 gap remains 5 rows.
Docs state that the active next step is materialization-aware pairing/search or a different model class, not more right-side source supply alone.

integration_gates.command: python3 agents/network.py validate && python3 agents/network.py validate-wave agents/waves/wave_67_all_right_supply_no_go.json
integration_gates.success_signal: The Wave 67 plan is internally consistent.
The Wave 67 all-right supply no-go report is valid JSON.
